programme.desc: Taiwan’s Alishan was ranked 19th on The New York Times list of the 52 Places to Visit in 2025, making it the only destination in Taiwan to be featured. Beyond its famous sunrise and forest railway, Alishan is also home to many hidden gems — among them, Lijia Tribe, located at the end of County Road 169. County Road 169 is the only route connecting Lijia to the outside world. The road ends there, requiring travelers to return the same way.

programme.title: No Ordinary Rescue S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Why are more mammals stranding on the coast of Taiwan? While in China, thousands of migratory birds fall prey to hunters and illegal trade. These ordinary people are coming together to fight back.

programme.title: Blizzard of Souls
programme.desc: After losing his mother and his home, Arturs finds some consolation in joining the army. However, war is nothing like he imagined.

programme.title: The President
programme.desc: After a brutal coup topples his regime, a fallen dictator flees with his young grandson. Disguised as street musicians, they cross a country scarred by his rule, exposed firsthand to the suffering he had ignored.

programme.title: A Murder Of Crows A Vigilante Justice
programme.desc: When a ransom demand suddenly appears, the disappearance of 19-year-old Tim Jatzkowski is now a cause of concern. While the boy’s father wants the police to rescue him, inspector Martin Brühl tries to convince his family to pay the ransom.

programme.title: Nick-Off Duty
programme.desc: When Lenny sets off on a mission to avenge her mother’s murder, she finds herself in trouble with the Russian mob and an underground organ harvesting ring. Her father, Hamburg cop Nick and his partner must race against the clock to rescue her.

programme.title: Three Quarter Moon
programme.desc: Hartmut, a taxi-driver, is left in a bitter slump when his wife leaves him. That is, until he gets six-year-old Hayat and her mother in his taxi. In a serendipitous turn of events, Hayat is left under his care and she helps him learn to enjoy life again.

programme.title: Pure White
programme.desc: Vural, a husband and a father who was raised in faith, leads a seemingly pious and conformist life. Yet, everything takes a sudden dark turn when he learns a truth that will force him to confront his views on religion and morality.

programme.title: Murder in Sainte Baume
programme.desc: Carel has returned to his native Provence. With his ex-schoolmate, today head of the local police, he investigates the death of a man killed by dozens of bee stings. Soon they uncover a horrific case from the past, one that had shaken the whole village.

programme.desc: Rudina embarks on a road trip with her pregnant sister Elma back to their Albanian hometown. However, Elma is unmarried, and they need to find someone to play the part of her husband in order not to anger their traditional father.

programme.desc: In small town Maine, a school bus driver becomes distracted during her end-of-day inspection and fails to notice a sleeping boy in the back of the bus. What happens next shatters the tranquillity of her small logging town.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP28
programme.desc: We join Regis Le Bris as he charts his meteoric journey from the training pitches of France to the dugout at Sunderland, where he masterminded an unlikely charge to the Premier League. We also travel back to France to uncover the formative experiences and influences that shaped one of football's most intriguing modern managers.

programme.desc: Back to back Comedy

programme.title: TENGKULAK KECE IDAMAN
programme.desc: Nadia (Debi Sagita) is rescued from thugs by Boni (Ridwan Ghani), though all of his medicines are destroyed in the scuffle. Impressed by his selfless care for the villagers, Nadia mistakenly believes Boni is a doctor. Touched by his kindness, she gifts him her late brother's unused car. Their bond deepens when Nadia chooses Boni's village as the subject for her university thesis.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP165
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Usia 2 Bulan Udah Jadi Apa? Jadi-an
programme.desc: Yogi’s (Ridho Illahi) life brightens up with the arrival of a new PE teacher, Wina (Nabila Zavira). He is captivated when she tells him, 'True strength doesn't just come from the body, but from a strong mind and heart.' However, Yogi’s admiration turns to heartbreak when he discovers Wina has given her heart to someone else.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP619
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP113
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: TOLONG PERMAK HATIKU
programme.desc: A traveling seamstress specializing in clothing alterations meets a handsome man during a roadside incident. Though sparks fly instantly, their romance faces a major obstacle: the man is already committed to someone else.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP165
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Halumu dan Haluku Jadi Halufyu
programme.desc: Alya’s (Callista Arum) car is blocked by Thoriq’s (Kevin Hillers) wonton cart. While looking for her boyfriend, Ozi, Alya discovers a painful truth: Ozi has been dating another woman named Hana for three years. After a public breakup at Thoriq’s stall, Alya and Thoriq grow closer, sparking a jealous rage in Hana.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP619
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: BUNGA CINTA BERSEMI DI BENGKEL
programme.desc: When Fery’s (Hardy Fadillah) delivery van breaks down, he ends up in a heated argument with a female mechanic named Nabila (Naomi Zaskia). Their parents, who are old friends, notice that their children's personalities don't match traditional gender roles. To 'fix' them, they agree to a swap: Nabila must work at Fery’s flower shop, while Fery must get his hands dirty at Nabila’s garage.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP114
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Tuhan Ijinkan Aku Berjodoh Sama Cowok Lele
programme.desc: Indri (Chantiq Schagerl) dreams of winning a roller-skating competition, but her path takes a detour when she meets Jojo (Christ Laurent), a catfish farmer. Jojo is haunted by a past breakup, and Indri find herself entangled in a mission to help him find his true love once again.

programme.title: Tuhan Ijinkan Aku Berjodoh Sama Cowok Lele

programme.title: Pesona Cowok Starboy Adalah Maut
programme.desc: What started as a fake romance turns into real feelings for Kevin (Kevin Hillers) and Indah. His ex, Liyan (Elina Joerg), refuses to accept the breakup and conspires with Andre (Rexy Rizky) to sabotage their relationship and make Indah hate Kevin.

programme.title: Dua Hati Sarangheyo To SarangBeo
programme.desc: Keni (Fendy Chow) is forced into an unusual disguise: he must pose as a Korean Idol to save a 'Meet and Greet' event organized by Erika. Reluctantly, Keni steps into the spotlight, leading to a series of comedic and high-pressure situations.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep2 - EP102
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep3 - EP3
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Love, protect and care for our planet earth - EP106
programme.desc: In this episode, we will talk about the importance of reducing, recycling, and reusing materials. We will discover that it's very important to take care of our pets and the environment where we live. Curious will teach us that our planet Earth is everyone's home and together we must treat it with lots of love and respect.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Gratefulness - EP107
programme.desc: In this episode, Nova will invite the children to a new expedition to the world of values. Together, they will learn about gratitude, the importance of giving "thanks" and appreciating what we have to always see the positive side of life. Curious will teach us about gifts such as love and friendship which are invisible but very valuable and we should be grateful to have them.

programme.title: Mellodees - The Grand Old Duke Of York - EP27
programme.desc: What a great day! It’s time for an outdoor stretch. Can you sing ‘The Grand Duke of York’? Then join the march with Dee on the streets!

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep14 - EP114
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Stripmined Mountain - EP106
programme.desc: Gisele and her Green Team fight Nick Slick from strip minning and destorying a beautiful mountain.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Win Klaus Win! - EP123
programme.desc: Klaus may have finally met his match as his rival, Niccolo Tessio, beats him in an official race, but Klaus has an ace up his sleeve: magic tires.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Out of Memory / Pizza to Go - EP120
programme.desc: When Von Bolt loses his memory – including the password to the lab’s ticking self-destruct mechanism! – the kids must explore his robot ancestry and with it the history of computers to help him remember. / A growth ray expands a tiny pizza up to gigantic proportions, and the Secret Lab Kids must stop i before it totally destroys their city!

programme.title: Mellodees - Itsy Bitsy Spider - EP3
programme.desc: With a rainstorm approaching, Dee has playtime in his room and makes a new little friend.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep20 - EP120
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Babysitters - EP122
programme.desc: The Shaq Paq has their work cut out for them this time as a routine babysitting gig turns into a search and rescue.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep2 - EP102
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ellixi Hair Revival Shampoo
programme.desc: A breakthrough 4-in-1 formula that colors, nourishes, volumizes, and strengthens hair—while improving scalp health in just 5 days. Powered by Korean patented polyphenol technology, it offers safe, natural grey coverage without harsh chemicals, leaving hair darker, fuller, and healthier with every wash. Ellixi发量黑洗发水，采用颠覆性的4合1配方：洗头同时染发、护发、增发量并强韧发丝，仅需5天即可改善头皮与发质。采用韩国专利多酚技术，无需染发剂或化学添加，温和自然遮盖白发。结合多酚氧化着色原理与草本养护成分，让秀发一洗更黑、更丰盈、更健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Wiltshire Pink Board Bundle
programme.desc: All-in-one knife, scissors and board bundle that makes your life easier with an in-built knife sharpener! 全套组合菜刀、剪刀、砧板，让你下厨更轻松！菜刀和剪刀附专业磨刀套！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thomson Circulon 125
programme.desc: High Strength Activated Ginkgo to Boost Your Mind and Circulation Thomson Circulon 125 – 125mg of Activated Ginkgo Biloba enhanced with cutting-edge Japanese Activated Technology for superior absorption. It helps to boost blood circulation, concentration, and enhance mental clarity, and helps relieve cold and numb hands and feet caused by poor blood circulation. 更高含量活性银杏，有助于提升您的思维和血液循环 Thomson Circulon 125 – 125 毫克高含量活性银杏精华，采用日本尖端活性技术，提升吸收率。它有助于促进血液循环、集中注意力、提升思维清晰度。有助于缓解因血液循环不良而产生的手脚冰冷麻痹等状况。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HQ Ling Zhi
programme.desc: HQ Lingzhi Cracked Spores Powder is formulated and manufactured in Singapore. It enhances the body’s immune system, reduces fatigue, promotes blood circulation, protects the liver, and improves metabolism. HQ 灵芝破壁孢子粉由新加坡配制和生产。它能够增强身体的免疫系统，减少疲劳，促进血液循环，保护肝脏，并改善新陈代谢。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Furi Knife Bundle Set
programme.desc: Slice, dice, and chop like a pro with our kitchen knives! 厨房刀片如同专业大厨一般娴熟！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - ASD Hybrid 3-ply Hex Wok 32 & 36cm
programme.desc: This cookware is made with strong stainless steel and a long-lasting non-stick coating from Whitford (USA). Its 7-layer design ensures even heat distribution and helps keep heat longer, providing great cooking results every time. Perfect for those looking for high-quality, easy-to-use kitchen tools. ASD爱仕达316不锈钢不粘炒锅采用三层钢结构与耐高温不粘涂层，结合了不锈钢的耐用与不粘锅的便捷。蜂窝纹理设计省油防粘，食材加热均匀，不怕铁铲和钢丝球刮擦，适合烹饪各种坚硬食材。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - PHS HAIRSCIENCE HOM/FEM Anti-Hair Loss Bundle
programme.desc: FEM & HOM Fortify Hair Loss Bundle restore scalp health and reduce hair fall for both men and women with thinning hair concerns. FEM & HOM 防脱发套组，恢复头皮健康，减少男女头发稀疏问题。

programme.desc: Sleek and lightweight Thermos Mug with strainer for you to enjoy your tea to the fullest. Suitable for everyday use! 一杯多用， 茶水分离, 设计典雅的茶漏咖啡杯让你方便携带！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - EBENE’s Bio-Ray Knee Guard with Tourmaline

programme.title: Sembang Sihat S2 - EP 2

programme.desc: Financial trouble at Zulkifli’s company forces the family to tighten their belts. As uncertainty grows, Azlina decides to seek employment.

programme.title: Lintas Pintas - EP 9
programme.desc: Contestants compete as a team in each episode by passing through a maze with different doors and try to accumulate as much money as possible by answering a simple multiple choice question at each door. After crossing the 10th door, the team enter their Prize Vault to collect their winning amount. Contestants stand to win up to 10,000 worth of cash and prizes.

programme.title: Remy & Jin Hee - EP 5
programme.desc: Love is truly blind. Yes it is. This is a story of how 2 undergrads with contrasting personalities, almost 3000 miles apart meets in a student exchange programme and falls in love. "Remy & Jin Hee" combines the elements of a romantic Shakespearean play and the style of a lighthearted Korean idol drama. These 8 episodes promises to be refreshing, one that fuses K-Pop fashion and with our very own traditional Malay culture.

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock’ Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it’s not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Brain Candy TV

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock’ Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it’s not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Misha, the Purple Cat
